sentiment.reasoning: A product recall in enterprise software indicates immediate operational failure and potential reputational damage that will likely persist through the quarter.

headlines.headline: Xovol Goods reports 20% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: A 20% decline in operating income is a direct negative indicator of financial health that will weigh heavily on investor sentiment.

headlines.headline: Halvav Brands recalls products in enterprise software line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: The recall of enterprise software products creates immediate negative pressure on revenue and customer trust that will likely linger.

headlines.headline: Joval Brands opens new office in Central Europe

sentiment.reasoning: Opening a new office is a strategic expansion move that signals growth but has a delayed and uncertain financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
